_description: Schema for Buffett Oracle company cards. One file per company per analysis year.
analyzed_date: string — ISO date when this card was created

g1_roe_roic.metric_used: string — 'ROE' or 'ROIC' (use ROIC if equity is negative/distorted)

g2_fcf_to_ni.value: float — FCF divided by Net Income
g2_fcf_to_ni.fcf: float — free cash flow in millions USD
g2_fcf_to_ni.net_income: float — net income in millions USD

g6_earnings_yield.ev_m: float — enterprise value in millions USD

owner_earnings_note.summary: string — required when g2 fails but the moat still passes
owner_earnings_note.maintenance_vs_growth_view: string — distinguish maintenance capex from expansion capex
owner_earnings_note.decision_impact: string — explain whether the raw g2 fail still stands or looks too blunt

quality_multiple_note.summary: string — required when g6 fails but the moat still passes
quality_multiple_note.reason_for_low_yield: string — explain whether the low yield reflects genuine quality, strategic scarcity, or simple overpayment
quality_multiple_note.decision_impact: string — explain whether the raw g6 fail still stands or looks too blunt

gates_failed: string — list of gates that triggered, e.g. 'g1_roe_roic', 'g4_revenue_trend'

key_insight: string — one sentence summary of the main lesson
